turning_point.snippet: Just had a cancellation here in the studio

signals.snippet: Just had a cancellation here in the studio

cause_analysis.narrative: Sanctuary Spa NYC churned on 2026-03-03 after 135 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-27 via sms — 66 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 66 day(s) before churn via sms. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

messages.body: I’m guessing you might have missed my first message because NEW CLIENTS paying Full Price instead of Discounted ones usually sounds like a good deal.  If you're interested, just reply ‘YES’ and we’ll chat here. If not, reply ‘NO’, no hard feelings at all (I will sip my coffee and will try to move on)
